code_quality_issues.title: Missing Return Type Hints
code_quality_issues.description: Multiple methods lack return type declarations

issues.impact: Reduces code clarity and IDE assistance

issues.expected: Return type is array but should be more specific
issues.impact: Array return type is too generic
Missing return type for JSON response

code_quality_issues.title: Inconsistent Code Style
code_quality_issues.description: Mix of inline and multi-line syntax patterns

issues.issue: Model relationships defined in single-line format
issues.suggestion: Use consistent multi-line format for better readability

code_quality_issues.title: Unused Protected Variable
code_quality_issues.description: Protected variable declared but not used

issues.issue: Defined as 'protected StockService $stockService' in constructor parameter but not used consistently
issues.current: Injected via constructor but also used as parameter
issues.suggestion: Remove protected variable or use consistently

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Missing Use Statement for StockRecord
php_laravel_specific_issues.issue: Uses 'StockRecord' without importing it at the top
php_laravel_specific_issues.impact: Will cause undefined class error at runtime

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Weak Authorization in Form Requests
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: All Form Requests return true in authorize() method
php_laravel_specific_issues.current: public function authorize(): bool { return true; }
php_laravel_specific_issues.issue: Authorization check is bypassed for all requests
php_laravel_specific_issues.impact: Any authenticated user can perform actions regardless of permissions
php_laravel_specific_issues.severity_note: Authorization is handled at controller level via policies, but it's still a weak pattern

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Incomplete Method in ProductController
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: Method implementation appears cut off in store() and update()
php_laravel_specific_issues.issue: Methods might be incomplete based on code structure
php_laravel_specific_issues.note: Requires verification in actual file - line 55 and line 100 show store() calls

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Missing Return Type on Methods
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: Controller and service methods missing return types

issues.issue: Return type array is too vague

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Deprecated Transaction Pattern
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: DB::transaction returns value not properly typed
php_laravel_specific_issues.issue: Transaction results not captured properly in some cases

example.issue: Result of transaction not assigned to variable

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Inconsistent Model Method Definitions
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: Model methods not following Laravel conventions

issues.expected: Multi-line format or follow model convention

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Missing Type Hints in Method Parameters
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: Some service methods lack proper type hints

issues.method: createMutation(Product $product, Warehouse $warehouse, string $type, int $quantity, ?Model $reference = null, array $options = [])
issues.issue: Parameter types are present but return type missing

php_laravel_specific_issues.title: Error in Decimal Precision
php_laravel_specific_issues.description: Decimal precision set very high (15,2) which is excessive

issues.issue: 15 digits total with 2 decimal places allows up to 9,999,999,999,999.99
issues.suggestion: Use (12, 2) or (11, 2) for more reasonable precision

security_issues.title: Weak Authorization Check
security_issues.impact: Authorization is only at controller level, not request level
security_issues.recommendation: Implement proper authorization in each request class

security_issues.title: Potential XXE in XML/File Handling
security_issues.description: No validation on file uploads in some endpoints
security_issues.note: Mimes validation is present but could be stricter

security_issues.title: Direct User Input in Stock Transactions
security_issues.description: User-controlled quantity used in stock calculations
security_issues.issue: User quantity input: (int) $request->quantity - could be manipulated
security_issues.mitigation: Validation is present but additional rate limiting recommended

security_issues.title: OTP Stored in Database Without Encryption
security_issues.description: OTP codes stored as plain text
security_issues.recommendation: Should use hashed OTP with time-based expiration

security_issues.title: Potential SQL Injection via Morph Relationship
security_issues.issue: Morph relationships should validate allowed models
security_issues.impact: Could allow loading of unintended model types

security_issues.title: No CSRF Token Validation Explicit
security_issues.description: CSRF middleware should be applied but not explicitly shown
security_issues.note: Middleware likely configured globally but should be explicit in routes

security_issues.title: Unescaped Output in API Response
security_issues.description: Customer name and other fields not HTML-escaped in JSON
security_issues.note: JSON responses are generally safe but XSS could occur on frontend

database_migration_issues.title: Foreign Key Added in Separate Migration
database_migration_issues.description: branch_id foreign key constraint added after initial creation
database_migration_issues.issue: Indicates initial users migration may have been incomplete
database_migration_issues.recommendation: Should be included in initial users table creation migration

database_migration_issues.title: Primary Image Uniqueness Not Database-Enforced
database_migration_issues.description: Uniqueness constraint on is_primary enforced at application level only
database_migration_issues.issue: MySQL does not support conditional unique indexes for is_primary = true
database_migration_issues.risk: Race conditions could occur in concurrent requests
database_migration_issues.recommendation: Consider using application-level locking or database triggers

database_migration_issues.title: Excessive Decimal Precision
database_migration_issues.description: Multiple columns use decimal(15,2) allowing values up to 9,999,999,999,999.99
database_migration_issues.recommendation: Use decimal(12,2) or decimal(11,2) for reasonable business values

api_route_issues.title: Inconsistent Error Response Format
api_route_issues.description: API endpoints return different error formats

issues.format: See different format in receive() method

api_route_issues.title: Missing Validation Error Response
api_route_issues.description: Some endpoints don't handle validation errors consistently
api_route_issues.note: Validation is performed but error format might differ from other endpoints

api_route_issues.title: Missing HTTP Method Documentation
api_route_issues.description: Routes use custom HTTP methods (PATCH, PUT) inconsistently
api_route_issues.issue: Some endpoints use PATCH for updates, some use PUT
files_affected: routes/api.php - line 50: PATCH for work-orders status
routes/web.php - line 65: PATCH for work-orders status
api_route_issues.recommendation: Standardize on PUT for full updates and PATCH for partial

api_route_issues.title: Missing Error Handling in API Endpoints
api_route_issues.description: Some API endpoints lack proper try-catch blocks
api_route_issues.issue: No error handling - exceptions will expose stack traces

api_route_issues.title: Inconsistent Pagination Per-Page Default
api_route_issues.description: Different endpoints use different default pagination sizes

api_route_issues.title: Missing API Rate Limiting
api_route_issues.description: No rate limiting on critical endpoints
api_route_issues.recommendation: Implement throttle middleware on sensitive endpoints

api_route_issues.title: Missing API Documentation
api_route_issues.impact: API consumers cannot easily discover endpoints
api_route_issues.recommendation: Add Laravel Sanctum OpenAPI documentation or use Scribe

immediate_actions: Fix missing StockRecord import in Api/StockController.php
Implement proper authorization checks in all FormRequests
Add try-catch error handling in Api/SupplierController endpoints
Add return type hints to all controller and service methods
short_term: Reduce decimal precision from (15,2) to (12,2) in all migrations
Standardize error response format across all API endpoints
Add rate limiting to authentication and critical endpoints
medium_term: Add query complexity analysis for complex queries
Implement primary image uniqueness with database-level constraints or locking
long_term: Add monitoring and alerting for security events
